compare.title: HeyGears vs RESIONE — Resin Comparison
compare.subtitle: Find the right RESIONE alternative for your HeyGears resin. Based on performance data, color matching, price analysis, and real-world usage.
compare.dataSources: Data sources: Taobao · Amazon US · HeyGears Store (US/EU) · RESIONE Official
compare.disclaimer1: Amazon US data is limited (HeyGears store recently launched) — for reference only
compare.disclaimer2: Color matching is approximate. Exact color codes may differ between brands.
compare.disclaimer3: Always test a sample before switching resins for production use.
compare.disclaimer4: Mechanical properties listed are per manufacturer specs. Real-world results depend on printer, settings, and post-processing.
